generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance AutonomousVehicleChassisLower : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis responsible for steering and speed control via motor and servo actuators"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleChassisUpper : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis hosting autonomy components including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for ACC logic execution"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller managing motor voltage commands for real-time speed adjustment adhering to ISO 15622 for ACC performance class I"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance EgoVehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor capturing real-time ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring current steering angle of the autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing object detection and tracking with point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTrackData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera capturing environmental context via point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraPointCloudData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object track data with position/velocity estimates from LiDAR/depth camera processing"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance Vehicle3DCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based visualization of the autonomous vehicle chassis and environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Sensor Data Model containing position/velocity estimates of detected objects from LiDAR/depth camera processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler, SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control Model implementing Adaptive Cruise Control logic per ISO 15622 for performance class I"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance HistoricalDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Time-series database model storing historical ego vehicle state and object track data for reporting"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance ReportGenerationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Human-readable report generation model for time-series data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based middleware for inter-entity communication and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2DataTranslationEnabler, ROS2DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for programming NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer"
    DTDFVocab:enables JetsonACCLogicEnabler
]

instance Python38Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 environment for ROS2 node lifecycle management and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance CppROS2Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ ROS2 node lifecycle management for system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2DataTranslationEnabler, ROS2DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for ACC logic development and testing"
    DTDFVocab:enables JetsonACCLogicEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering from LiDAR/depth camera data"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiDARPointCloudData, DepthCameraPointCloudData
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering for object tracking from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackData
]

instance WiFiCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi communication protocol for inter-entity data transfer between physical and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing historical data and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataModel, ReportGenerationModel
]

instance ROS2DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based data translation functional entity for serializing sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo WiFiCommunicationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance ROS2DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based data processing functional entity handling point cloud clustering and object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance JetsonACCLogicEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano-based ACC logic execution environment"
]

instance OPCUAEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OPC UA (IEC 62541) potential implementation for data translation (not fully utilized)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2DataTranslationEnabler
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected objects, and projected driving path in 3D Visualization FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectDetectionInsight, PathProjectionInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from on-board ECUs to cloud-based Digital Twin Entity, reducing resource constraints"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote control of ACC (enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking) via Control Panel FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteEnableAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed and steering angle data"
]

instance ObjectDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of detected objects with position/velocity estimates from LiDAR/depth camera processing"
]

instance PathProjectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of projected driving path based on object detection and ACC logic"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable report generation of ego vehicle state and object tracks as time-series data"
]

instance RemoteEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking command execution"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C12: Digital Twin Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwinEntity [
    base:desc "Centralized single-instance entity hosting automotive-specific functionalities (point cloud clustering, actuation) following ISO 23247 entity-based structure"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalTwinPhysicalEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:contains AutonomousVehicleChassisLower, AutonomousVehicleChassisUpper, VedderElectronicSpeedController, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, DBSCANClusteringEnabler, KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwinEntity [
    base:desc "Cloud-based Digital Twin Entity hosting ACC control logic and remote management services"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment AutonomousVehicleEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:contains ROS2MiddlewareEnabler, ROS2DataTranslationEnabler, ROS2DataProcessingEnabler, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:UserEntity [
    base:desc "User interface entity split into 3D Visualization and Control Panel components for remote management"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment AutonomousVehicleEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:contains User3DVisualizationFE, UserControlPanelFE
]

instance User3DVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization interface for real-time vehicle state and object detection visualization"
]

instance UserControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel interface for remote ACC management (enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking)"
]

// C13: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinPhysicalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains AutonomousVehicleChassisLower, AutonomousVehicleChassisUpper, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, EgoVehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes commands from the DT to the physical twin: **remote enable/disable of ACC, setting desired speed, and emergency braking**. These commands are transmitted via Wi-Fi to the Digital Twin Entity, processed by the **Controlling FE**, and forwarded to the Physical Twin Entity for actuation. The system adheres to ISO 15622 for ACC control logic, with actuation executed via motor voltage commands to the speed controller."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time scales**, with synchronization between the physical and virtual twins constrained to ≤100ms end-to-end latency for critical control signals. Clock synchronization is achieved with an accuracy of ≤100ms across distributed devices to ensure event ordering and data integrity. The system adheres to 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for V2V communication requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as a **three-entity system** (Physical Twin Entity, Digital Twin Entity, User Entity) with clear ownership boundaries: **Physical Twin Entity** handles sensor data processing and actuation; **Digital Twin Entity** manages data collection, storage, and control logic; **User Entity** provides visualization and remote management interfaces. The **Data Translation FE** acts as a cross-system intermediary, serializing and aligning data formats between entities. The architecture deviates from ISO 23247 by introducing the Physical Twin Entity and splitting the User Interface FE into visualization and control components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used for cyber-physical experimentation (e.g., ACC algorithm validation) during vehicle design.
  - **Manufacturing Phase**: Enabled retrofitting of the autonomous vehicle (physical twin) with autonomy components (e.g., LiDAR, Jetson Orin Nano).
  - **Operation Phase**: Deployed for real-time monitoring, remote management, and optimization of ACC during vehicle operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through: **1) Real-time data validation** (e.g., LiDAR/depth camera synchronization); **2) Latency constraints** (≤100ms for critical control signals); **3) Clock synchronization** (≤100ms accuracy); **4) Verification/Validation (V/V)** via ISO 15622 compliance for ACC control logic; **5) Uncertainty handling** in object tracking (Kalman filter for state estimation); **6) Safety-critical design** (no remote execution of unsafe operations on the physical twin). The DT’s models are validated against real-world autonomous vehicle behavior during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection employs **Wi-Fi communication** for inter-entity data transfer (Physical Twin Entity ↔ Digital Twin Entity) and **ROS2 middleware** for intra-entity communication. Data serialization and alignment are handled by the **Data Translation FE**, ensuring compatibility between ROS2 message types. The system adheres to **3GPP 22.185** for V2V communication latency requirements (<100ms)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity is deployed on external hardware (different from the vehicle’s Jetson Orin Nano), while the Physical Twin Entity runs on the vehicle’s autonomy hardware (Jetson Orin Nano, LiDAR, etc.). The Digital Twin is hosted on a cloud/server infrastructure for data storage and processing."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates with external systems indirectly via:
  - **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) Requirements**: Adheres to 3GPP 22.185 for V2V communication latency (≤ 100 ms), though explicit V2X (Vehicle-to-Everything) integration is not detailed in the case study."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is not explicitly detailed in the documents. The Physical Twin stores data externally (SQL databases), but no specific privacy standards (e.g., encryption protocols) are mentioned for raw sensor data transmission."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards: **1) ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework)** for reference architecture (entity-based structure); **2) ISO 15622 (Automotive ADAS—Adaptive Cruise Control)** for ACC control logic; **3) 3GPP 22.185 (Vehicle-to-Vehicle communication)** for latency requirements; **4) ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2)** for middleware; **5) IEC 62541 (OPC UA)** as a potential implementation for data translation FEs. The Physical Twin Entity deviates from ISO 23247 by incorporating automotive-specific functionalities."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Latency and Synchronization**: ≤ 100 ms end-to-end latency and clock synchronization (±100 ms) ensure real-time safety-critical operations.
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: The DT is designed as a Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop (remote management via Control Panel FE).
  - **Safety-Critical Design**: Compliance with ISO 15622 (ACC performance class I) and adherence to safety-critical principles (e.g., Kalman filtering for object tracking). Wi-Fi communication is assumed to use standard encryption protocols (not explicitly detailed)."
]
